details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory was missing (created during this run). All other expected top-level dirs (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) present. reports/audit/ present.

no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory still exists at repo root with 5 Python modules (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). Per CSA_VERDICT_clawdbot_removal evidence, this should have been removed.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory contains active code. Additionally, the following scripts reference moltbot/clawdbot in code/config (not audit/docs exclusions): scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py
